---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# jumble <img src="man/figures/logo.png" align="right" height="139" alt="" />

<!-- badges: start -->
[![CRAN status](https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/jumble)](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=jumble)
<!-- badges: end -->

The objective of jumble is to provide a pretty discrete colour palette that is also relatively colourblind and contrast safe on a light background.

## Installation

You can install the development version of jumble from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("davidhodge931/jumble")
```

## Example

```{r example}
library(jumble)

scales::show_col(jumble)
```
